name: Multiline Input
description: Textarea-based input for multi-line freeform text with optional adornments, validation, and auto-resize behavior.

onChange.description: Change handler passed via `textAreaProps.onChange` for text updates.

placeholder.description: Placeholder text shown when value is empty.

rows.description: Minimum visible rows for the textarea.

readOnly.description: Prevents editing while still allowing selection and copy.

variant.description: Visual variant for hierarchy against surrounding surfaces.

validationStatus.description: Displays validation state and status adornment (when enabled).

startAdornment.description: Leading content/adornment in the input container.

endAdornment.description: Trailing content/adornment in the input container.

textAreaProps.description: Attributes and event handlers applied directly to the internal textarea.

slots.endAdornment: Optional trailing adornment content (for example count, icon, or button).

keyboard: Tab focuses multiline input when enabled and moves focus out in tab order
Shift+Tab moves focus to previous focusable element
Typing keys insert characters at cursor position
Space inserts space when textarea is focused
ArrowLeft/ArrowRight move caret and support selection behavior
Backspace removes selection or previous character
Enter triggers focused interactive adornment when adornment control has focus
aria: Prefer wrapping in `FormField` for visible label, helper text, and validation messaging
Use accessible labeling through `FormField` or `textAreaProps` ARIA attributes
Disabled multiline input is skipped in tab order
In read-only/disabled states, ensure interactive adornments mirror state (for example disabled buttons)

inside: Freeform narrative input where text length is unknown
